functions.name: GEO
functions.description: Returns a single KYTC roadway attribute (e.g. County_Name, Route_Label, Milepoint) for a coordinate pair.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Kentucky: ~36.5 to 39.1.

parameters.name: lon
parameters.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Kentucky: ~-89.6 to -82.0.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: KYTC return key, e.g. "County_Name". Use =KYTC.FIELDS() to browse all available keys.

functions.name: GEO_MULTI
functions.description: Returns multiple KYTC roadway attributes for a coordinate pair, spilling right across columns.

functions.name: FIELDS
functions.description: Returns the full KYTC field catalog as 3 columns: Key, Description, Coverage (Always/Recommended/Situational). Spills down.
